sentences.en: Every morning, Sarah wakes up early.
She opens her eyes and looks at the clock.
It is seven o'clock.
She gets up slowly and goes to the kitchen.
She makes a cup of tea and drinks it by the window.
sentences.ko: 그녀는 차 한 잔을 만들어 창가에서 마십니다.

sentences.en: Outside, the sky is light blue.
The birds are singing in the trees.
A dog is walking with its owner on the street.
sentences.ko: 강아지 한 마리가 주인과 함께 거리를 걷고 있습니다.

sentences.en: Sarah smiles.
They are quiet and peaceful.
After her tea, Sarah gets dressed.
sentences.ko: 차를 마신 후, 사라는 옷을 입습니다.

sentences.en: She puts on her blue jacket because it is a little cold today.
sentences.ko: 오늘 날씨가 조금 춥기 때문에 파란 재킷을 입습니다.

sentences.en: Then she picks up her bag and goes outside.
sentences.ko: 그런 다음 가방을 들고 밖으로 나갑니다.

sentences.en: She walks to the bus stop.
The bus comes in five minutes.
On the bus, Sarah listens to music.
She looks out the window and watches the city.
There are many people on the street.
Some are going to work.
The city is busy in the morning.
Sarah works at a small library near the center of the city.
sentences.ko: 사라는 도심 근처의 작은 도서관에서 일합니다.

sentences.en: She loves her job.
Every day, she helps people find books.
sentences.ko: 매일 그녀는 사람들이 책을 찾도록 도와줍니다.

sentences.en: She also helps children who come to read after school.
sentences.ko: 그녀는 방과 후에 독서하러 오는 아이들도 돕습니다.

sentences.en: At lunchtime, Sarah eats a sandwich in the garden.
There are flowers and a little fountain.
The sound of the water is very relaxing.
At five o'clock, the library closes.
On the way home, she stops at the market.
sentences.ko: 집으로 가는 길에 그녀는 시장에 들립니다.

sentences.en: She is going to make soup for dinner.
sentences.ko: 그녀는 저녁 식사로 수프를 만들 예정입니다.

sentences.en: At home, Sarah cooks her soup slowly.
The kitchen smells very good.
She reads her book for one hour.
sentences.ko: 그녀는 한 시간 동안 책을 읽습니다.

sentences.en: Then she turns off the light and goes to sleep.
sentences.ko: 그런 다음 불을 끄고 잠자리에 듭니다.

sentences.en: Tomorrow will be another good day.
